calendar.matters:
To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment:
APPEAR: David H. Williams, Esq. 510/647-1900 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT. COURT HAS REVIEWED SETTLEMENT AND FINDS IT CONFORMS WITH ALL LEGAL REQUIREMENTS). Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780

MOTION Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Plaintiff'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Jusdgment;
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STERLING INC. Joinder In Plaintiff's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Jusdgment:
APPEAR: David H. Williams, Esq. 510/647-1900 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court ruled as follows on the joinder: The Court does "not grant joinder, actually non-opposition." (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780
